subcodes.first_line: Praise be befitting the most exalted, most holy court of the Desired One, Who through His most sublime Word on the Day of the Covenant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد ساحت امنع اقدس حضرت مقصودی را لایق و سزاست که بکلمه علیا در یوم میثاق
subcodes.subjects: @Holy Days and the Baha'i calendar, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @petitions to authorities, @Word of God and human limitations, @chastisement and requital, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
